other_observers: Paul Neldner; Found by Lisa Rawinski on August 25, 2012. Also seen by John Rawinski and Randy Ghormley
specific_location: Blanca Wetlands. Far south end of pond # 16
description: Head dark and strongly patterned with dark collar, dark short upturned bill. Dark eye. Approx. 9.5 inches (based on sizes of much larger American Avocets, Yellowlegs in vicinity). Wings dark with some patterning. White belly. Bright orange, short legs.   In flight, strong white "V" on back. Striking pattern on upper wing. Broad white stripe in tail with black sub-terminal band. Clean white underwingBehaviors: Foraging for food on mudflat.Call: none heardPlumage: Adult non-breeding
photographer: Photographer: Polly Wren Neldner, Polly Wren Neldner, Polly Wren Neldner
